nasb.text: He who conceals his transgressions will not prosper, But he who confesses and forsakes them will find compassion.

esv.text: Whoever conceals his transgressions will not prosper, but he who confesses and forsakes them will obtain mercy.

cnv.text: 遮掩自己過犯的，必不亨通； 承認並離棄過犯的，必蒙憐憫。

ccb.text: 自掩其罪，必不亨通； 痛改前非，必蒙怜悯。

csbs.text: 掩盖自己过犯的，不会兴盛； 承认并离弃过犯的，必蒙怜悯。
